examples: Any of various plants of the genus Allium with edible bulbs found growing wild.
This Allium is easy to grow and does well in average to rich, well drained soil.
Plant all varieties of Allium in rich, well-drained soil in full sun in early fall.
Among the products featured is Allium, a spherical lampshade made from peacock feather-shaped slats.
Professor Arab said previous research had shown that a compound in garlic called allium partially protects animals against cancer.
